documentation:
## Aliyun ROS ACTIONTRAIL Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as ACTIONTRAIL from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-actiontrail';
```

documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'
param id: '- scoped id of the resource.'

documentation:
---
param props: '-'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.attr_name
documentation: :Attribute: Name: The name of the trail to be created, which must be unique for an account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.name
documentation: :Property: name: The name of the trail to be created, which must be unique for an account.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.event_rw
documentation: :Property: eventRw: Indicates whether the event is a read or a write event. Valid values: Read, Write, and All. Default value: Write.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.oss_bucket_name
documentation: :Property: ossBucketName: The OSS bucket to which the trail delivers logs. Ensure that this is an existing OSS bucket.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.oss_key_prefix
documentation: :Property: ossKeyPrefix: The prefix of the specified OSS bucket name. This parameter can be left empty.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.role_name
documentation: :Property: roleName: The RAM role in ActionTrail permitted by the user.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.sls_project_arn
documentation: :Property: slsProjectArn: The unique ARN of the Log Service project.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrail.sls_write_role_arn
documentation: :Property: slsWriteRoleArn: The unique ARN of the Log Service role.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACTIONTRAIL::Trail`, which is used to create a trail to deliver events to Simple Log Service or Object Storage Service (OSS).

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Trail` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-actiontrail-trail>

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.attr_is_logging
documentation: :Attribute: IsLogging: Indicates whether the trail is logging API invocations.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.attr_latest_delivery_error
documentation: :Attribute: LatestDeliveryError: The last time an error occurred when the trail attempted to deliver log files.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.attr_latest_delivery_time
documentation: :Attribute: LatestDeliveryTime: The date and time of the last successful delivery of a log file.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.attr_start_logging_time
documentation: :Attribute: StartLoggingTime: The most recent date and time when the user enables the trail.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.attr_stop_logging_time
documentation: :Attribute: StopLoggingTime: The most recent date and time when the user disables the trail.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.enable
documentation: :Property: enable: Whether to enable the trail logging.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.RosTrailLogging.name
documentation: :Property: name: The name of the trail to be enabled.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACTIONTRAIL::TrailLogging`, which is used to enable or disable trail logging.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `TrailLogging` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-actiontrail-traillogging>

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.Trail.attr_name
documentation: Attribute Name: The name of the trail to be created, which must be unique for an account.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACTIONTRAIL::Trail`, which is used to create a trail to deliver events to Simple Log Service or Object Storage Service (OSS).

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosTrail\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-actiontrail-trail>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ACTIONTRAIL::TrailLogging`, which is used to enable or disable trail logging.


This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosTrailLogging\`\`for a more convenient development experience.

methods.name: ros_cdk_actiontrail.TrailProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Trail`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-actiontrail-trail>

```
param name

Property name: The name of the trail to be created, which must be unique for an account.

param event_rw

Property eventRw: Indicates whether the event is a read or a write event. Valid values: Read, Write, and All. Default value: Write.

param oss_bucket_name

Property ossBucketName: The OSS bucket to which the trail delivers logs. Ensure that this is an existing OSS bucket.

param oss_key_prefix

Property ossKeyPrefix: The prefix of the specified OSS bucket name. This parameter can be left empty.

param role_name

Property roleName: The RAM role in ActionTrail permitted by the user.

param sls_project_arn

Property slsProjectArn: The unique ARN of the Log Service project.

param sls_write_role_arn

Property slsWriteRoleArn: The unique ARN of the Log Service role.
```
